title: hieracium cremnanthes
side_effects: Hieracium cremnanthes can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity. In some cases, improper use of Hieracium cremnanthes may cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Additionally, excessive consumption of the plant may interact with certain medications, further exacerbating potential health issues.
